title: Scelli
description: An improved screens library for my mods.
body:
Scelli is a simple library for creating custom screens.

# Current Features
- Custom Screen class
- Custom Widget class
- 7 Custom Widgets
- Screen Handler class (to load screens wherever without crashing)

# Planned Features
- Vanilla screen implementation


# Current Widgets
- Text Widget
- Button Widget
- Widget List
- Widget Folder
- String Input Widget
- Number Input Widget
- Slider Widget

# Planned Widgets
- Tab Widget
